Israeli Forces Enter Eastern Outskirts of Beit Yahoun, Lebanon
— S3 · Conflict · Beit Yahoun, Lebanon · 1h ago. Israeli troops move into the eastern outskirts of Beit Yahoun in southern Lebanon, confirmed by Lebanese state media, marking a ground incursion.

— S3 · Conflict · Gaza Strip, Palestine · 4h ago. Israeli strikes cut power to hospitals across Gaza, deepening the humanitarian crisis.
